SEARCH
Package plugin

Class Connect_util

java.lang.Object
plugin.Connect_util
public class Connect_util extends Object
This class provides functions defined in the Connect module.

  • Method Details

    • readMLLPMessage

      public static String readMLLPMessage(InputStream inputStream) throws IOException
      Reads an HL7 message encapsulated in MLLP format from an InputStream. This method ensures that only valid messages are processed.
      Parameters:
      inputStream - The input stream to read from.
      Returns:
      The extracted HL7 message, or an empty string if no message is available.
      Throws:
      IOException - If an error occurs during reading.

    • encapsulateHL7Message

      public static String encapsulateHL7Message(String hl7Message)
      Encapsulates an HL7 message in MLLP format.
      Parameters:
      hl7Message - The HL7 message to encapsulate.
      Returns:
      The MLLP-encoded message.

    • send_hl7_msg

      public static String send_hl7_msg(Analyzer analyzer, String url_upstream, String hl7_msg)
      Send hl7 message to an upstream.
      Parameters:
      analyzer - the analyzer loaded.
      url_upstream - url to reach service.
      hl7_msg - HL7 message in ER7 format
      Returns:
      ack, message in hl7 format if OK.

    • archiveMessage

      public static void archiveMessage(String id_analyzer, String archive_msg, String message, String labType, String srcType)
      Archives the message in the specified directory based on labType and srcType.
      Parameters:
      id_analyzer - The analyzer ID.
      archive_msg - The flag indicating whether to archive ("Y" to enable).
      message - The message to be archived.
      labType - The lab identifier ("LAB-27", "LAB-28", "LAB-29").
      srcType - "LIS" or "Analyzer".

    • loadMappingToml

      public static com.moandjiezana.toml.Toml loadMappingToml(String mappingPath)
      Loads a TOML mapping file from the given path. If the file does not exist or cannot be read, an empty TOML object is returned.
      Parameters:
      mappingPath - The mapping file path (with or without ".toml").
      Returns:
      The parsed TOML object.
